prompt: A depth map of a road merge, showing the merging lane from the right midground (gray), main highway stretching from the center foreground (bright) to the background (dark), with cars positioned along the merging lane.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map depicting a road merge. The main highway occupies the center, starting bright in the foreground and progressively darkening as it extends into the background. A merging lane enters the scene from the right midground, rendered in a uniform medium gray. Multiple cars are positioned along this merging lane, their grayscale values consistent with the lane's depth.
objects: Merging lane, entering from the right midground
Multiple cars, positioned along the merging lane
